raw.raw_text: Every ~15 minutes I get kicked back to the login screen while working in the dashboard. Super frustrating because I lose my query state. Happens on Chrome and Safari, both incognito and regular. Observed: redirected to /login with no warning. Expected: session stays active while I am actively using the app.

Happens on Chrome and Safari, both incognito and regular. Observed: redirected to /login with no warning. Expected: session stays active while I am actively using the app.
reproduction_steps: Work in the dashboard for approximately 15 minutes.
fields.expected_result: session stays active while I am actively using the app

severity_rationale: Affects user authentication and session handling (user_auth), which is a critical path with a severity floor of S1.
analysis.impact_summary: Users are logged out every ~15 minutes, disrupting their workflow and causing them to lose their query state.
risk_rationale: Matches critical path 'user_auth' indicating severity must be at least S1.
The frequent logout indicates potential backend session duration misconfiguration or validation issue.

conflicts: LLM raised flags rules did not: ['backend_validation']
